dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: HM?

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: THIS GUY HASN'T CHANGED POSTURES OR EXPRESSIONS SINCE CLASS STARTED; ISN'T HE BORED?

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: THE ONLY THING HE'S BEEN DOING IS GLIMPSE OVER OCCASIONALLY.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: SPEAKING OF, IK-HAN, WHY'S HE GOING SO CRAZY WITH THE MOUSE WHEN HE'S TAKING NOTES?

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: IS HE TYPING WITH HIS MOUSE?

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: I SEE THAT EVERYDAY BUT CAN NEVER GET USED TO IT.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: THERE'S DEFINITELY A STRANGE VIBE ABOUT THE NEW GUY.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: KIDS FROM OTHER CLASSES CAME OVER DURING RECESS, BUT COULDN'T TALK TO HIM BECAUSE OF THE VIBE.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: SHIT, HE REALLY IS HANDSOME.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: BUT NO MATTER HOW HANDSOME HE IS,

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: JUST BECAUSE I'M SITTING BESIDE HIM...

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: WHY DO I HAVE TO RECEIVE SUCH GLARES FROM THE GIRLS OF OLD CLASS? SOMETHING IS NOT FAIR; I COULD GRIN AND BEAR IT ALL, BUT,

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: DAMN IT!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: KHH KHH YUNA~

dialogue.speaker: YUNA
dialogue.line: NO NO

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: SHINOO THIS PLINKOOO

dialogue.speaker: TEACHER
dialogue.line: SINCE THERE'S A NEW GUY AND IT'S BEGINNING OF WEEKENDS, I WILL LET HIM OFF.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: THE BUILDING WAS BUILT JUST 4 MONTHS AGO, AND PURCHASED BY SOMEONE LAST MONTH; NO ONE LIVES IN THIS BUILDING.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: THE "SOMEONE" DIDN'T EXIST FROM THE FIRST PLACE.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: EVERYTHING WAS PLANNED OUT THOROUGHLY.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: BUT NO ONE WOULD HAVE KNOWN THE MASTER WAS ASLEEP IN HERE; THAT GOES FOR ME AS WELL.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: HOW MUCH WAS COINCIDENCE AND HOW MUCH WAS PLANNED,

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: IF, EVEN ONE OF THEM WAS INVOLVED,

summary: Students observe a new, mysterious, and handsome transfer student who shows no expression and has a strange vibe. One student, Yuna, laments receiving glares from other girls because she sits next to him. The episode also includes narration about a recently purchased, empty building where a "master" is asleep, hinting at a larger plan.
